items.title: Control menace of touts at Tiruchendur temple: Vanathi Srinivasan urges CM Vijay
items.summary: Touts were collecting between ₹500 and ₹1,000 from devotees, promising them expedited darshan, she alleged
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Train Crashes Into Bangkok Traffic, Killing at Least 8
items.summary: A freight train plowed into traffic on train tracks, starting a fire. The authorities did not immediately give a cause but said a barrier had not come down.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Strike over high fuel prices paralyses transport in Kenya
items.summary: Key roads have remained largely empty and some schools have asked students to stay at home.
